Qualitative Insights

Open-Ended Narrative Summary

Department: All | Full-Time Status: All | Location: All | n = 126

Employees report stronger execution when priorities are sequenced clearly and tradeoffs are explained. Cross-team handoffs remain uneven in lower-scoring cuts, and workload pacing is a recurring concern.

"When leaders explain why priorities changed, the team adapts faster."
Avg Fundamental Score 3.7

Theme evidence combines narrative synthesis with supporting quotes and score context.

Leadership 3.85 Above Standard Watch Workload
